settings.text: Structured improvement programs for every skill level — April through September at Northcrest Golf.

settings.title: Beginner Path
settings.text: Zero to playing in 6 weeks. Fundamentals of grip, stance, swing, and course etiquette. No experience needed.

settings.title: Break 100
settings.text: For players shooting 100+. Focused on consistency, course management, and the mental game.

settings.title: Break 90
settings.text: For 90-105 shooters. Ball-striking improvement, short game refinement, and strategic thinking.

settings.title: Junior Academy
settings.text: Ages 8–17. A full-season program that builds fundamentals, confidence, and love of the game.

settings.title: Simulator League
settings.text: Indoor 9-week competitive league on Golfzon simulators. Great for winter and serious players year-round.
